name: python-lib
description: Minimal Python library scaffold with src layout, tests, and pyproject metadata.

files.content:
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=69", "wheel"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "example-python-lib"
version = "0.1.0"
requires-python = ">=3.11"
dependencies = []

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
pythonpath = ["src"]

from __future__ import annotations

from example_python_lib.core import add

__all__ = ["add"]

from __future__ import annotations

from example_python_lib import add


def test_add() -> None:
    assert add(2, 3) == 5
